purge.confirmMessage: Once deleted, this entry can't be restored from the recycle bin. If you're signed in, sync will remove it from the cloud too — merging from cloud won't bring it back. Continue?

footnote: Entries you remove from the main list land here. Restore them to the home screen, or delete forever (no undo from the bin).

emptyState.title: Recycle bin is empty
emptyState.body: When you delete an entry, it stays here so you can recover mistakes
